01 — ABOUT
8+ YEARS · Bangalore · Bridal & Editorial

Makeup is architecture for the face. I'm Aarohi Mehta, a Bridal & Editorial makeup artist based in Bangalore, with over 8 years working across weddings, runway and commercial campaigns. My approach is structural — skin first, pigment second, restraint always. I build looks that photograph at every angle and survive a 14-hour day. No filters, no flattening — just faces that look like themselves at their sharpest.

BAFTA JURY MEMBER TOM FORD PARTNER VOGUE ITALIA — 2024 HARPER'S BAZAAR NET-A-PORTER Bangalore FASHION WEEK
WORK WITH ME →

07 — FAQ
?

How should I prepare for my appointment?

+
Arrive with clean, moisturised skin. Avoid heavy serums or SPF with white cast on the day. Bring inspiration photos and your outfit colour so I can balance temperature and tone.

What products and brands do you use?

+
A professional kit built around Charlotte Tilbury, Pat McGrath, Tom Ford, MAC, Danessa Myricks and Westman Atelier. All products are sanitised between clients; lashes and applicators are single-use.

How long does each service take?

+
Bridal makeup runs 3 hours including skin prep. Trials are 2 hours. Natural glam is 1.5 hours. Editorial is half or full day depending on the number of looks required.

Do you travel, and is there a travel fee?

+
Yes. Travel within Bangalore is included. Outside the city is charged at standard mileage, plus accommodation for calls before 7am or shoots over two consecutive days.

What is your booking deposit and cancellation policy?

+
A non-refundable 30% deposit secures your date. Cancellations within 14 days forfeit the deposit; within 48 hours the full fee applies. Date moves are accommodated once at no charge.

Do you offer a bridal trial session?

+
Yes, and I strongly recommend booking one 4–8 weeks before the wedding. We lock in the look, test wear-time against your skin type, and finalise timings for the morning of.

Do you take group bookings / hen parties?

+
Yes — minimum of 3 people. Pricing is per person and includes a complimentary strip or individual lash for each guest. For groups over 6 I'll bring a trusted second artist.

What payment methods do you accept?

+
Bank transfer for deposits, all major cards via Stripe, and cash on the day for the remaining balance. Invoices issued for commercial and editorial bookings on request.
Aarohi Mehta
Bridal & Editorial makeup artist based in Bangalore, India. Available worldwide.
